title: Love One Another.
excerpt: Been thinking a lot about love and healing this weekend, as I heard the tragic news about Heidi Swapp losing her 16-year old son . I'm not great with words, especially when the tears come pouring out first. Sometimes there…
body:
Been thinking a lot about love and healing this weekend, as I heard the tragic news about Heidi Swapp losing her 16-year old son. I'm not great with words, especially when the tears come pouring out first. Sometimes there are no words. Just love.

To share the love with Heidi and her family at this time, Becky Higgins is organizing a project you can learn more about here and Persnickety Prints is also doing something which you can read about here.

Still trying to spread more love and motivation for each of your Mondays this year. I'm still using this watercolor set from Michaels and a brush that says Royal 2 on it (can’t remember where it’s from, sorry!). If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!
